evidence.description: The Iranian Oil Bourse was a key policy initiative of Ahmadinejad's government, intended to challenge dollar dominance in oil trading.

evidence.source_title: Iran opens oil bourse, but dollar trade continues
evidence.description: Reuters reported the opening as a government policy action under Ahmadinejad's administration.

editorial_notes: The oil bourse was a flagship economic policy of Ahmadinejad's first term.
